title: Investigation of real fires – annual summaries
body: "These reports produced by OFR Consultants summarise findings from fires as part of an ongoing monitoring and review by the Building Safety Regulator (BSR) of Approved Document B.  The investigations centre on fires of special interest concerning building regulations, with particular attention to building fire performance.  The findings and recommendations do not represent government policy or guidance but form part of the ongoing monitoring of the effectiveness of the guidance and will be considered alongside other evidence. "
